name: Bipolar Disorder - Mood Stabilizer Medication Query
description: Tests ability to find bipolar patients via mood stabilizer prescriptions. Lithium is highly bipolar-specific; valproate and lamotrigine are cross-indicated with epilepsy/migraine.
prompt: Find patients prescribed mood stabilizers including lithium, valproate, or lamotrigine.

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed mood-stabilizing medications — including lithium (gold standard), valproate, and lamotrigine.
prompts.expert: Search MedicationRequest with RxNorm codes for lithium (6448), valproate (40254), lamotrigine (28439). Note: valproate and lamotrigine cross-indicated with epilepsy/migraine. Query: MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|6448,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|40254,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|28439

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on mood stabilizers. Lithium is bipolar-specific; valproate/lamotrigine cross-indicated.
